title: Architect/Editor Model Routing Benchmark
description: Compares three routing strategies: cheap model only, expensive model only, and architect-editor split. Measures success rate, token cost, and time.

tasks.prompt:
Implement a function cache decorator in Python. The public interface MUST be:

```python
@disk_cache(cache_dir="./cache", ttl=3600)
def my_function(x: int) -> int: ...

# Or as a class
cache = DiskCache(cache_dir="./cache", ttl=3600)
@cache
def another_function(x: int) -> int: ...
```

Requirements:
- Wraps any function with disk-backed cache
- Cache key: function name + repr(args) + repr(kwargs), hashed for filename safety
- Cache files are JSON, stored in cache_dir
- TTL in seconds (ttl=0 means no expiry)
- Handles unhashable args (lists, dicts) via repr()
- Thread-safe via threading.Lock
- Cache.clear() method to invalidate
- No external deps, standard library only

This IS the cache_decorator.py file. Write the full implementation module with disk_cache decorator and DiskCache class.

Implement a typed event emitter in TypeScript that:
- Supports typed events via generics: EventEmitter<Events>
- Events map: on, off, emit, once
- Wildcard listener '*' catches all events
- Listener count tracking per event
- Error handling: one listener failing doesn't stop others
- RemoveAll method to clear all listeners for an event or all events

Write to event-emitter.ts

Implement a configuration file parser in Python that:
- Parses a custom config format: KEY=VALUE and [SECTION] headers
- Supports comments (#) and blank lines
- Nested section access: config.get('section.key')
- Type coercion: auto-detect booleans (true/false), integers, floats
- Environment variable expansion: $VAR or ${VAR}
- Merging: load multiple files, later files override earlier ones
- Write errors to a log instead of crashing on malformed lines

Write to config_parser.py
